preflop.rationale: Premium pair AA vs weak 72o. Raise forces bot to fold weak hand.

raise.reason: Bot folds to preflop raise. Player wins pot uncontested.

call.reason: Bot checks, then value-bets postflop. AA loses to runner-runner straight.

check.reason: Bot raises, player calls, bot catches straight on river.

fold.reason: Player folds preflop, loses small blind.
